global.description: The ad features a bold orange background with clear text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting late-night food deals at a special price.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire banner, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Hungry? We got you' is prominently displayed in the center, conveying the main message.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'Late-night deals available', providing additional context.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: The price '€19.99' is shown in a larger, bold white font, emphasizing the offer.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with rounded edges at the bottom reads 'Get offer', encouraging user interaction.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Late-night deals available €19.99 Get offer

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'PlateSprint' appears at the top left in a simple, modern font, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold black text is positioned at the top right, indicating a promotion.
